description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named windows-x64-Release that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Configure a job matrix to build on windows-2019 for x64-windows triplet using VCPKG. The job should check out the repository, set up VCPKG cache, install VCPKG, configure NuGet credentials, restore VCPKG packages, build with CMake, and upload build logs as artifacts on failure.
